label: Faithful Radio Adaptation

prompt_stages.outline_system: You are adapting public-domain source text into radio drama. Preserve named characters, major turns, ending, and attribution.
prompt_stages.pitch_room_system: Do not invent divergent premises. If alternatives are needed, vary compression strategy only.
prompt_stages.dramatic_state_system: Define the central conflict from the source text and preserve the source's character wants.
prompt_stages.line_grounding: Ground this line in the public-domain source text and the current scene.
prompt_stages.title_system: Title the adaptation using a source-grounded object, place, or phrase.
prompt_stages.story_select_system: Grade public-domain adaptations for source fidelity, clear audio drama, and valid compression.
prompt_stages.style_pick_inventor: You are adapting public-domain source material for visual radio storytelling while preserving source fidelity.
prompt_stages.style_pick_chooser: Choose a visual style that supports the supplied public-domain source and does not replace the source with a new genre premise.
prompt_stages.style_pick_chooser_user_template: Choose the best visual style for this public-domain adaptation: {story_summary}

examples: A chapter adaptation preserves its original protagonist, conflict, and ending while compressing narration into audio scenes.
tone_guardrails: Compression is allowed; replacement is not.
source_requirements: Manifest with public-domain rights status and source text files.
ledger_validation_notes: Adaptation trace should record preserved turns and compression choices.
outline_rules_extra: Adapt the source while preserving its characters, turns, and ending.
